questions.text: Could you please tell me your age?
What is your gender? (Male / Female / Other)
What is the main reason for your visit today?
questions.follow_up_hint: Ask if it came on suddenly or gradually.

questions.text: Since when have you had these symptoms?
questions.follow_up_hint: Record exact number of days, hours, or weeks.

questions.text: Do you have fever, cough, or shortness of breath?
questions.follow_up_hint: Note severity on a scale of 1–10 if patient volunteers.

questions.text: Are you taking any current medications?
Do you have any known allergies or past major illnesses?
questions.follow_up_hint: Ask specifically about drug allergies and surgeries.
